features: 10" Tilting Angle: Reduce glare and gain for a better viewing experience
Low Profile Design: Mount your TV close to the wall with a 25mm plush design

description: From the manufacturer 10" Tilting Angle: Reduce glare and gain a better viewing experience Strong Steel Construction: Holds a maximum weight load of 20kg Compatibility: VESA mounting patterns 75 x 75, 100 x 100, 200 x 100, 200 x 200 AV:Link | Low Profile Tilting TV Wall Bracket for 26 to 50" Televisions Easy to install, low profile tilting wall bracket, Constructed of reinforced Steel. mount and support your TV or monitor screen on your desired wall, saving space and receiving that optimal viewing height. Designed to be easily installed and supplied will all required installation hardware. IMPORTANT INFO: Designed for concrete and plaster wall installation. Ensure you find and install into the wooden studs of plaster walls. FEATURES: 10" Tilting Angle: Reduce glare and gain for a better viewing experience Low Profile Design: Mount your TV close to the wall with a 25mm plush design Strong Steel Construction: Holds a max weight load of 30kg Compatibility: VESA mounting patterns 200 x 100, 200 x 200, 300 x 300, 400 x 400 Installation hardware is included: See box contains within additional content. BOX CONTAINS: 1 x TV mount 1 x Wall bracket 1 x Magnetic spirit level 4 x 25mm M4 machine screws 4 x 25mm M5 machine screws 4 x 25mm M8 machine screws 4 x Square washers 6 x Washers 6 x Wall mounting screw 6 x Wall plugs 4 x Plastic spacers SPECIFICATION: Screen size 26" - 50" Max VESA 400 x 400 Tilt range 0 to 10° Max. weight load 30kg Distance from wall 25mm Wall plate dimensions 452 x 218mm Bracket dimensions 452 x 420mm Weight 1.16kg
